Package org.javalabs.jpa.query

Class QueryExpr

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.query.QueryExpr
All Implemented Interfaces:
Expr, Visitable
public class QueryExpr extends Object implements Expr
The expression criteria class to hold the parsed expression.
Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

    • rhs

      public Object rhs()
      Description copied from interface: Expr
      Return the right side operand of this expression. It will be null for ISNULL or ISNOTNULL operator. For BETWEEN operator, it will have two values.
      Specified by:
      rhs in interface Expr
      Returns:
      String
